"use strict";
var __decorate = (this && this.__decorate) || function (decorators, target, key, desc) {
    var c = arguments.length, r = c < 3 ? target : desc === null ? desc = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(target, key) : desc, d;
    if (typeof Reflect === "object" && typeof Reflect.decorate === "function") r = Reflect.decorate(decorators, target, key, desc);
    else for (var i = decorators.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) if (d = decorators[i]) r = (c < 3 ? d(r) : c > 3 ? d(target, key, r) : d(target, key)) || r;
    return c > 3 && r && Object.defineProperty(target, key, r), r;
};
var __metadata = (this && this.__metadata) || function (k, v) {

Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true });
exports.DocumentController = void 0;
const common_1 = require("@nestjs/common");
const platform_express_1 = require("@nestjs/platform-express");
const swagger_1 = require("@nestjs/swagger");
const common_2 = require("@nestjs/common");
const document_service_1 = require("./document.service");
const document_lifecycle_service_1 = require("./document-lifecycle.service");
const services_1 = require("./services");
const document_reference_service_1 = require("./services/document-reference.service");
const record_form_landing_service_1 = require("./services/record-form-landing.service");
const document_reference_health_service_1 = require("./services/document-reference-health.service");
const dto_1 = require("./dto");
const document_control_dto_1 = require("./dto/document-control.dto");
const archive_document_dto_1 = require("./dto/archive-document.dto");
const document_lifecycle_dto_1 = require("./dto/document-lifecycle.dto");
const jwt_auth_guard_1 = require("../auth/jwt-auth.guard");
const unified_permission_guard_1 = require("../../shared/guards/unified-permission.guard");
const require_permission_decorator_1 = require("../../shared/decorators/require-permission.decorator");
const department_permission_service_1 = require("../department-permission/department-permission.service");
const statistics_cache_interceptor_1 = require("../../common/interceptors/statistics-cache.interceptor");
let DocumentController = class DocumentController {
    constructor(documentService, lifecycleSvc, filePreviewService, documentReferenceService, departmentPermissionService, recordFormLandingService, referenceHealthService) {
        this.documentService = documentService;
        this.lifecycleSvc = lifecycleSvc;
        this.filePreviewService = filePreviewService;
        this.documentReferenceService = documentReferenceService;
        this.departmentPermissionService = departmentPermissionService;
        this.recordFormLandingService = recordFormLandingService;
        this.referenceHealthService = referenceHealthService;
    }
    async upload(dto, file, req) {
        return this.documentService.create(dto, file, req.user.id);
    }
    async findAll(query, req) {
        return this.documentService.findAll(query, req.user.id, req.user.roleCode);
    }
    getDueSoon(days) {
        return this.lifecycleSvc.getDueSoon(days ? parseInt(days, 10) : 30);
    }
    listRecordFormIndex(keyword, department, templateGroupId) {
        return this.recordFormLandingService.list({ keyword, department, templateGroupId });
    }
    batchConfirmRecordFormLanding(dto, req) {
        return this.recordFormLandingService.batchConfirmSuggested(dto.codes, req.user?.id || 'system');
    }
    getRecordFormLandingSuggestion(code) {
        return this.recordFormLandingService.suggest(code);
    }
    confirmRecordFormLanding(code, dto, req) {
        return this.recordFormLandingService.confirm(code, dto, req.user.id);
    }
    getRecordFormFieldCoverage(code) {
        return this.recordFormLandingService.getFieldCoverage(code);
    }
    getRecordFormIndexEntry(code) {
        return this.recordFormLandingService.get(code);
    }
    updateRecordFormIndexEntry(code, dto) {
        return this.recordFormLandingService.upsertTarget(code, dto);
    }
    getReferenceHealthIssues() {
        return this.referenceHealthService.listIssues();
    }
    async findOne(id, req) {
        const document = await this.documentService.findOne(id, req.user.id, req.user.roleCode);
        const canAccess = await this.departmentPermissionService.canAccessDepartmentResource(req.user.id, document.departmentId, 'view', 'document');
        if (!canAccess) {
            throw new common_2.ForbiddenException('无权访问该部门的文档');
        }
        return document;
    }
    async getDocumentReferenceHealth(id, req) {
        const document = await this.documentService.findOne(id, req.user.id, req.user.roleCode);
        const canAccess = await this.departmentPermissionService.canAccessDepartmentResource(req.user.id, document.departmentId, 'view', 'document');
        if (!canAccess) {
            throw new common_2.ForbiddenException('无权访问该部门的文档');
        }
        return this.referenceHealthService.getDocumentHealth(id);
    }
    async getVersionHistory(id, req) {
        return this.documentService.getVersionHistory(id, req.user.id, req.user.roleCode);
    }
    async getVersionPreview(id, version, req) {
        return this.documentService.getVersionPreview(id, version, req.user.id, req.user.roleCode);
    }
    async downloadVersion(id, version, req, res) {
        return this.documentService.downloadVersion(id, version, req.user.id, req.user.roleCode, res);
    }
    async deactivate(id, req) {
        return this.documentService.deactivate(id, req.user.id, req.user.roleCode);
    }
    async archive(id, dto, req) {
        return this.documentService.archive(id, dto.reason, req.user.id, req.user.roleCode);
    }
    async restore(id, dto, req) {
        return this.documentService.restore(id, dto.reason, req.user.id, req.user.roleCode);
    }
    async update(id, dto, file, req) {
        return this.documentService.update(id, dto, file, req.user.id);
    }
    updateMarkdown(id, dto, req) {
        return this.documentService.updateMarkdown(id, req.user.id, req.user.roleCode, dto);
    }
    async remove(id, req) {
        return this.documentService.remove(id, req.user.id);
    }
    async permanentDelete(id, req) {
        return this.documentService.permanentDelete(id, req.user.id);
    }
    async submitForApproval(id, req) {
        return this.documentService.submitForApproval(id, req.user.id);
    }
    async downloadFile(id, req, res) {
        return this.filePreviewService.downloadFile(id, req.user.id, req.user.roleCode, res);
    }
    async getPreviewUrl(id, req) {
        return this.filePreviewService.getPreviewUrl(id, req.user.id, req.user.roleCode);
    }
    async convertFile(minioPath) {
        return this.filePreviewService.convertToHtml(minioPath);
    }
    async createReference(id, dto) {
        return this.documentReferenceService.createReference(id, dto);
    }
    async getReferences(id) {
        return this.documentReferenceService.getReferences(id);
    }
    async getReferenceImpact(id) {
        return this.documentReferenceService.getReferenceImpact(id);
    }
    publish(id, dto) {
        return this.lifecycleSvc.publish(id, dto);
    }
    createRevision(id, req) {
        return this.documentService.createRevisionDraft(id, req.user.id);
    }
};
exports.DocumentController = DocumentController;
__decorate([
    (0, common_1.Post)('upload'),
    (0, swagger_1.ApiOperation)({ summary: '上传文档' }),
    (0, swagger_1.ApiConsumes)('multipart/form-data'),
    (0, common_1.UseInterceptors)((0, platform_express_1.FileInterceptor)('file')),
    __param(0, (0, common_1.Body)()),
    __param(1, (0, common_1.UploadedFile)(new common_1.ParseFilePipe({
        validators: [
            new common_1.MaxFileSizeValidator({ maxSize: 10 * 1024 * 1024 }),
            new common_1.FileTypeValidator({
                fileType: /^(application\/pdf|application\/vnd\.(ms-excel|openxmlformats-officedocument\.(spreadsheetml\.sheet|wordprocessingml\.document))|application\/msword)$/,
            }),
        ],
    }))),
    __param(2, (0, common_1.Req)()),
    __metadata("design:type", Function),
    __metadata("design:paramtypes", [dto_1.CreateDocumentDto, Object, Object]),
    __metadata("design:returntype", Promise)
], DocumentController.prototype, "upload", null);

    (0, common_1.Get)(),
    (0, swagger_1.ApiOperation)({ summary: '查询文档列表' }),
    __param(0, (0, common_1.Query)()),
    __param(1, (0, common_1.Req)()),
    __metadata("design:type", Function),
    __metadata("design:paramtypes", [dto_1.DocumentQueryDto, Object]),
    __metadata("design:returntype", Promise)
], DocumentController.prototype, "findAll", null);

    (0, common_1.Get)('due-soon'),
    (0, swagger_1.ApiOperation)({ summary: '查询即将到期复审的文件' }),
    __param(0, (0, common_1.Query)('days')),
    __metadata("design:type", Function),
    __metadata("design:paramtypes", [String]),
    __metadata("design:returntype", void 0)
], DocumentController.prototype, "getDueSoon", null);

    (0, common_1.Get)('record-form-index'),
    (0, swagger_1.ApiOperation)({ summary: '查询04记录表单落地索引' }),
    __param(0, (0, common_1.Query)('keyword')),
    __param(1, (0, common_1.Query)('department')),

    __metadata("design:type", Function),

], DocumentController.prototype, "listRecordFormIndex", null);

    __metadata("design:returntype", void 0)
